## MediaWiki impact

- [ ] No MediaWiki change needed

## Checklist

- [ ] Exact models are named.
- [ ] Cost/availability is included or marked unknown.
- [ ] Integration requirements are explicit.
- [ ] If tested, topology is documented.
- [ ] If social interaction is affected, norms/consent notes are included.
